t_ch: 砂金的行为背后一定有着更深层的逻辑。我猜他从最初就对匹诺康尼的秘密有所察觉，并不断在为揭开它而布局。
t_en: There must be some deeper meaning behind Aventurine's actions. I suspect he's been aware of Penacony's secret from the beginning... and has been continuously strategizing to unveil it.

t_ch: 如此一来，星穹列车在他的计划中处于什么位置就至关重要了。最坏的情况下…他可能会利用我们做些出格的事。
t_en: In that sense, the Astral Express' role in his plans would be imperative. In the worst case scenario... he may use us to do something unexpected.

t_ch: 假设事态真的发展到那一步，多一位盟友，也是多一份保险。匹诺康尼山头林立，局势远比贝洛伯格和仙舟复杂啊。
t_en: Assuming things do escalate to that stage, having an extra ally is a good insurance policy. Penacony has numerous factions, and the state of affairs is significantly more intricate than that of Belobog and the Xianzhou.

t_ch: 但我们必须给死者一个交代。
t_en: But we must mete out justice for the dead.

t_ch: {NICKNAME}说得没错，无论如何，我们都不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
t_en: {NICKNAME} is right. No matter what, we cannot ignore the safety of Penacony.

t_ch: 也许我们该就此抽身了。
t_en: Maybe we should now get outta here while we still can?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}说得也有道理，毕竟完全猜不透接下来会发生什么……
t_en: {NICKNAME} also makes a good point. We're completely in the dark on what's going to happen next...

t_ch: 但是，我还是觉得不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
t_en: But, I think we can't just ignore the safety of Penacony.

t_ch: 主角就是为此刻而存在的！
t_en: I Am the Bone of My Bat. Stellaron Is My Body and Trailblaze Is My Blood.

t_ch: 你又在说怪话了…但气势不错，无论如何，我们都不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
t_en: You're talking weird again... But it's a good vibe. No matter what, we can't ignore the safety of Penacony.

t_ch: 为了解开「钟表匠」的谜团，我们势必需要公司手中的信息。纵使前方危机四伏…但迎难而上才是「开拓」，对吧？
t_en: To solve the mystery of the Watchmaker, it is crucial to get the IPC's intel. The path ahead is fraught with danger... but what's Trailblazing without a little danger?

t_ch: 看来没有异议了。那…黄泉小姐？
t_en: Sounds like we've reached a consensus. Now... Miss Acheron?

t_ch: 我当然也会同行。
t_en: I will accompany you, of course.

t_ch: 那我们就出发咯！不过…得上哪去找他？
t_en: Let's move out then! But... where do we start looking for him?

t_ch: 别着急。如果真的有人布下了局…他一定会想方设法邀我们入场的。
t_en: No need to rush. If he truly has laid a trap... he will definitely use every means to lure us in.

t_ch: <size=36>女士们，先生们——</size>
t_en: <size=36>Ladies and gentlemen...</size>

t_ch: <size=36>匹诺康尼有史以来最惊奇、最盛大的表演即将开幕——</size>
t_en: <size=36>The most wondrous, most magnificent show in Penacony's history is about to begin...</size>

t_ch: <size=36>星际和平公司诚邀各位光临现场——克劳克影视乐园！</size>
t_en: <size=36>The IPC cordially invites everyone to — Clock Studios Theme Park!</size>

t_ch: …看吧。
t_en: ...Look.

t_ch: 如果演员和观众都到不了场，砂金那么多布置不就白费了吗？
t_en: Should both the performers and spectators fail to arrive, won't all of Aventurine's plans be for nothing?

t_ch: 出发吧，各位——到我们贯彻「开拓」之道的时候了。
t_en: Let's get going, everyone. The hour of trailblazing is upon us.

t_ch: 唔…总有种大事不妙的预感。{NICKNAME}，你准备好了吗？
t_en: Mm... I have a bad feeling that something big's gonna go down. {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

t_ch: 准备好了。
t_en: Ready.

t_ch: 那就事不宜迟，出发去影视乐园吧！
t_en: Let's waste no time and head to the theme park then!

t_ch: 再等等…
t_en: Wait...

t_ch: 你不会是有心理阴影了吧…放轻松，没事的。
t_en: Your trauma isn't getting to you, is it... Take it easy. It'll be fine.

t_ch: …瓦尔特先生。
t_en: ...Mr. Yang.

t_ch: 你为什么没有告诉同伴，我的*真实身份*？
t_en: Why did you not tell your companions about my true identity?

t_ch: 就像你说的一样，不是不愿，而是不能。那段漫长的故事…我也难以用三言两语向他人转述。
t_en: It's just like you said: An inability rather than an unwillingness. Plus it's a long story... not something that can be summed up in a few words.

t_ch: 但我愿意相信你，我对你的信任更多来自…个人的主观判断。
t_en: But I chose to believe you, and my trust in you stems more from... my own personal judgment.

t_ch: 我也相信——即便换作{M#他们}{F#她们}，也会做出同样的决定。
t_en: I also believe that, if it were their choice to make, they would make the same one.

t_ch: 非常感谢。
t_en: Thank you, I'm grateful.

t_ch: 作为回敬，在接下来的对峙中，倘若出现了对星穹列车不利的形势…我会站在你们这边。
t_en: To reciprocate, in the upcoming confrontation, if the odds aren't in the Astral Express' favor... I will stand with you.

t_ch: ——愿尽绵薄之力。
t_en: ...If my meager strength is required.

t_ch: 又回到这里了。砂金居然选了这么个引人瞩目的地方……
t_en: We're back here again. Aventurine actually chose a really conspicuous location...

t_ch: 这家伙搞得也太夸张了吧，真把自己当大明星了？
t_en: That guy's really taking it to a whole new level. Does he really think he's a superstar or something?

t_ch: 空无一人？之前猎犬们驱散了游客，现在他们也不知去向……
t_en: Not a soul in sight? The Hounds drove out the visitors, and now their whereabouts are unknown too...

t_ch: 各位，擦亮眼睛。对方显然是有备而来。
t_en: Everyone, pay attention. The other party has obviously come prepared.

t_ch: 真是姗姗来迟啊，星穹列车的各位，还有这边的…「不速之客」。
t_en: Astral Express, you're late, and this... "unsought guest."

t_ch: 我们来赴约了，砂金先生。按照礼仪，您也应该现身才是。
t_en: We've kept your appointment, Mr. Aventurine. It is customary to show yourself as well.

t_ch: 我当然会。但在那之前，我希望能再好好介绍下今晚的主角……
t_en: I will, naturally. But before that, I've got to introduce our guest of honor.

t_ch: 掌声有请——「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}！
t_en: Everyone give it up for... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron!

t_ch: 我们不是来选秀的。
t_en: We're not here for any pageantry.

t_ch: 这和缉拿真凶有关吗？
t_en: Does this have anything to do with the wanted murderer?

t_ch: 妈妈，我上电视了！
t_en: Mommy, look! I'm on TV!

t_ch: 容我提醒，这片舞台和{NICKNAME}的身份，应该都和缉拿真凶无关。
t_en: Let me remind you that in all likelihood, this stage and {F#her}{M#his} identity have nothing to do with the wanted murderer.

t_ch: 不，有关，当然有关。不然我为什么要努力取得你们的信任，再把各位邀请到这里？
t_en: Oh no, they do, of course they do. Otherwise, why would I work so hard to gain your trust and then invite you all here?

t_ch: 因为{M#他}{F#她}是唯一一名见证了三起命案的目击证人，能够证明「梦境中不存在伤亡」是一纸空谈的最佳人选！
t_en: Because {F#she}{M#he} is the only one who saw all three homicides. {F#She}{M#He} is the key to proving that The Family's "death does not exist in dreams" promise is nothing but a sham!

t_ch: 「三起命案」？
t_en: Three homicides?

t_ch: 对，女士，第三桩命案马上就要发生了。就在这里，克劳克影视乐园……
t_en: That's right, madam — the third one is about to happen right now, right here in Clock Studios Theme Park...

t_ch: 一场<color=#dbc291ff>真正盛大的死亡</color>。
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>A truly grand death</color>.

t_ch: 你、你、你，还有你…所有人都将死去——而这一切都因为你，「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}……
t_en: You, you, you, and you... All of you are going to die! And it's all because of you, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron...

t_ch: …你将在这里亲自化身「死亡」。
t_en: ...You will become the personification of "Death."

t_ch: 你到底想说什么？
t_en: What are you on about?

t_ch: 我以为自己的意图已经足够明显了……
t_en: I thought my intent was crystal clear...

t_ch: 你怎么保证自己能活下来？
t_en: You sure you're gonna survive this?

t_ch: 当然，不要小看「存护」。琥珀王的基石自会为我指明出路……
t_en: Don't underestimate the Preservation. The cornerstone of the Amber Lord will surely guide me...

t_ch: 我的能量可没那么大…
t_en: I ain't that powerful...

t_ch: 千万不要小看自己。我说过，你拥有足以掀翻整张牌桌的力量……
t_en: Never underestimate yourself. Like I said, you have the power to turn the tide on the entire game...

t_ch: 让我说得更明白些吧：我会引爆你体内的星核，在匹诺康尼制造一场小小的*意外*……
t_en: Let me be a little clearer: I will detonate the Stellaron in you, and cause a teeny-tiny accident on Penacony...

t_ch: 砰！整个乐园都将化作一场碎梦。然后，我将在家族做出反应前，成为公司舰队的领航人。
t_en: Bam! The entire theme park will be reduced to a shattered dream. Then, before The Family can even react, I'll become the IPC fleet's navigator.

t_ch: 虚张声势对我们没用。如果真能做到，你先前有的是机会。
t_en: Your bluff isn't fooling anyone. If you could really do that, you would have done so earlier.

t_ch: 你在跟我打赌？好啊，那我也和你赌。我赌自己能大获全胜，用一场史无前例的大爆炸证明「同谐」的誓言就是个彻头彻尾的笑话。
t_en: You wanna bet? Sure, I'll bet with you. I'm betting that it'll be a sweeping victory for me, by detonating an unprecedented explosion to prove that the vow of Harmony is a complete and utter joke.

t_ch: …你做不到。
t_en: ...You won't do it.

t_ch: 我当然能做到，不过是又一场赌博而已。
t_en: Of course I can. It's just another gamble.

t_ch: 我从茨冈尼亚的荒漠走来，为了六十枚赤铜币，人们在我身上烙下印记，为我戴上枷锁，将我送上刑架，埋入黄沙……
t_en: I came from the wastelands of Sigonia. For just sixty red copper coins, people paid to brand me, put me in chains, place me in the gallows, and bury me in the golden sands...

t_ch: 可太阳杀不死我，流沙反将我送向学会和公司的怀抱。记住，我不是偶然赢了一次，我从来没有输过。
t_en: But the sun could not kill me, and the quicksand sent me back to the embrace of the Guild and the IPC. Bear in mind, my victory wasn't just a stroke of luck — I've never been defeated.

t_ch: 给各位分享一则谚语吧：「睡眠是死亡的预演」。生命因何而沉睡？因为我们尚未准备好迎接死亡。
t_en: Have you ever heard the saying "Sleep is the rehearsal of death"? Why does life slumber? All because we are not ready for the final rest.

t_ch: 每一夜的入梦与赴死无异，正如此时此刻的你我，心怀死志，躲入睡乡。而「死亡」…也将应我们的梦呓前来。
t_en: Every night is practice for the end. You and I are escaping into our dreams for fear of death at this very moment. And "Death"... will surface in our dreams.

t_ch: 朋友们，游戏已经开始了。你们无法拒绝——
t_en: Friends, the game has commenced, and you cannot choose to decline...

t_ch: ——没有理由，也没有余地。
t_en: ...Nor do you have any reason or grounds to.

t_ch: 你…要启程了么？
t_en: You're... leaving?

t_ch: 嗯。
t_en: Mhmm.

t_ch: 也许…会途经你所说的地方。
t_en: Perhaps... I might pass through the place you mentioned.

t_ch: 匹诺康尼……
t_en: Penacony...

t_ch: 你想在梦中寻求什么？
t_en: What do you hope to find within a dream?

t_ch: 我不需要寻求什么。
t_en: I'm not looking for anything.

t_ch: 它们不在梦中。
t_en: They aren't in a dream.

t_ch: 恐怕家族并不会为你开门。
t_en: I'm afraid The Family will not open the doors for you.

t_ch: 为什么？
t_en: Why?

t_ch: 因为你行走的道路…不为「同谐」所容。
t_en: Because the path you walk... is not accepted by the Harmony.

t_ch: 即便…这非我所愿？
t_en: Even if... that's not what I want?

t_ch: 即便这非你所愿。因为祂与其他星神不同。
t_en: Precisely because it's not what you want. Because THEY are not like other Aeons.

t_ch: 祂从不瞥视任何人，祂也无需瞥视任何人。
t_en: THEY have never glanced at anyone, and THEY never need to.

t_ch: 祂留下命途的织缕，任由人们行走，共同罗织一道巨大的影子…而这影子亦默默地笼罩他们本身。
t_en: THEY leave woven strands of fate for humans to walk, and together, THEY weave a great shadow... And this shadow silently envelops them.

t_ch: 总有从阴影中归来的人。
t_en: There are always those who rise from the shadows.

t_ch: 他们大多成了那影子的一部分。
t_en: They mostly become a part of the shadow.

t_ch: 在你眼中，我也一样吗？
t_en: In your eyes, am I the same?

t_ch: 你还留有一丝色彩……
t_en: You still have a strand of color...

t_ch: …但并不多。
t_en: ...But not much.

t_ch: …这就足够了。
t_en: ...That is enough.

t_ch: 在它们彻底消散之前……
t_en: Before they vanish completely...

t_ch: 我会抵达{RUBY_B#第IX机关}「虚无」的尽头{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: I will reach {RUBY_B#Device IX}the Nihility's end{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 女士们，先生们，各位逐梦客，富豪，「钟表匠」和家族的贵宾——
t_en: Ladies, gentlemen, dream seekers, tycoons, esteemed guests of the Watchmaker and The Family...

t_ch: ——还有大名鼎鼎的，星穹列车的无名客！欢迎来到星际和平公司的秀场！
t_en: ...Also not forgetting the Nameless of the renowned Astral Express! Welcome to the Interastral Peace Corporation's live show!

t_ch: 来吧，看看谁能笑到最后——游戏开始！
t_en: Alright, let's see who has the last laugh — let the game begin!

t_ch: 即便身处逆境，人只要还有希望，就一定会跟注……
t_en: Even on a losing streak, as long as people still have hope, they'll keep throwing money on the table...

t_ch: 你们蕴含的可能性，值得让我放手一搏…！
t_en: The chance, no matter how small, the potential is what you hang onto. That's what justifies the gamble!

t_ch: 哼，所有人都这样……
t_en: Everybody's like that, down to the last player.

t_ch: 为什么——不能活得更痛快一点？
t_en: So why can't I be happy too? Why can't I feel that free?

t_ch: 这是…什么地方？
t_en: What... is this place?

t_ch: 巨大的黑洞，和海……
t_en: A gigantic black hole, and... sea...

t_ch: 我…成功了么……
t_en: Have... Have I succeeded?

t_ch: 「虚无」…是么？
t_en: Nihility... is it?

t_ch: 也许在你看来，我是一位隐藏身份的「令使」，但是……
t_en: Perhaps to you, I am just an Emanator who's hiding her identity, but...

t_ch: {RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}从不瞥视任何人，祂无貌无形，更无意志可言…「虚无」平等地笼罩着每个人。
t_en: {RUBY_B#Nihility IX}The sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#} never glance at anyone. THEY have no face, no form, and even less of a will to speak... The Nihility envelops everyone equally.

t_ch: 只是有些人在祂的阴影下走得更远，沾染了更多的「无」…仅此而已。
t_en: Only some who have gone under THEIR shadow can go farther, tainting themselves with more Nihility... That's all.

t_ch: 仅此而已…朋友，你真的让我不知该怎么接话了。
t_en: That's all... My friend, you really leave me at a loss for words.

t_ch: 所以…这就是我的终点，死后之地？
t_en: So... Is this my final destination, the land of the dead?

t_ch: 这只是一场转瞬即逝的梦，「IX」的万千表征之一…在「虚无」的见证下，我们在此短暂停留，然后行向各自的方向。
t_en: This is all but a fleeting dream, one of the thousands of manifestations of IX... Under the watchful eye of Nihility, we momentarily linger here, before moving on to our own paths.

t_ch: 看来我的死亡已经注定。
t_en: It seems that my death has already been determined.

t_ch: 即便你希望如此…我也无法给出承诺。
t_en: Even if you wish for it... I can't promise you anything.

t_ch: 既然目的已经达成，我想你可以更坦诚些。
t_en: Now that you've accomplished your goal, I think you can be a little more forthcoming.

t_ch: 什么意思？
t_en: What do you mean?

t_ch: 你在乐园的表演十分精彩，虚张声势…单纯但实用的技巧，骗过了几乎所有人。
t_en: Your performance at the theme park was wonderful and grandiose... A simple yet practical technique that fooled almost everyone.

t_ch: 不会有人想到，你如此大费周章，甚至不惜押注自己的生命，只是为了再度确认一个看似早已被否定的事实……
t_en: No one would have ever thought that you would have gone to such lengths, even staking your life, just to prove a fact that had seemingly been disproved long ago...

t_ch: 「匹诺康尼的梦境中并不存在『真正的死亡』」。
t_en: "'Real death' does not exist in Penacony's Dreamscape."

t_ch: …我有什么理由这么做？
t_en: ...Why would I do this?

t_ch: 因为只有这样，你才能触及那个比连环凶案更不可告人的秘密……
t_en: Because this is the only way you can uncover a secret that is even more unspeakable than the serial murders...

t_ch: 你才能借「梦中的死亡」去往那里，在这场盛会中，人们时刻寻求的那片应许之地……
t_en: To use this "dream death" to get there, to that promised land people constantly seek in this grand gathering...

t_ch: …钟表匠的遗产，真正的{RUBY_B#流放之地}「匹诺康尼」{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Penacony — the Legacy of the Watchmaker, the true land of exile.

t_ch: …你是怎么发现的？
t_en: ...How did you find out?

t_ch: 我也未曾料想，自己意外得知的某件事，会成为串联一切的关键。
t_en: I never imagined that something I learned about unexpectedly would become the key to connecting everything.

t_ch: 是「那个人」的身份，对吧？
t_en: It's that person's identity, isn't it?

t_ch: 看来你也知情。
t_en: I see you're in the know.

t_ch: 我不能确定，但我愿意赌那个可能性。
t_en: Let's just say I'd put money on the possibility.

t_ch: …「命案」是个好借口，但还远远不够。即便匹诺康尼真的存在那么一两起谋杀，影响的也只是极少数人，掀不起波澜。
t_en: ...The murder isn't nearly enough to disrupt business as usual. Even if there were one or two murders on Penacony, most people wouldn't be personally affected — and that won't create any waves.

t_ch: 这片{RUBY_B#忆域}美梦{RUBY_E#}并非汪洋大海，而是一座孤岛。家族用「同谐」修筑堤岸高墙，隔绝外界，守护人们不会在大海中溺亡……
t_en: This {RUBY_B#Memory Zone}dream{RUBY_E#} of theirs isn't a boundless sea, it's a lonely island. The Family used the Harmony to build a high wall and isolate them from the vast and treacherous ocean of the outside world.

t_ch: …同时也借助这道「隔绝死亡」的壁垒，将不为人知的秘密埋葬于深海中。在没有痛苦和伤亡的美梦里，那些秘密也会永远不见天日。除非……
t_en: That barrier they built "keeps death out," but it also keeps the secrets that are lost in that watery abyss from floating to the surface. In a beautiful dream, free of suffering, who would want to go fishing for those secrets. No one. Unless...

t_ch: 除非有人去往壁垒的另一边……
t_en: Unless someone goes to the other side of the barrier...

t_ch: …并且能活着回来。
t_en: ...And lives to tell the tale.

t_ch: 有人已经做到了。
t_en: Someone already has.

t_ch: 我很早就获得了提示：如果哑巴指向的并非「不能发声之人」，那就只可能是「不能说话之人」……
t_en: I got the idea early on, chewing on that Masked Fool's little hint. If a mute isn't "someone who cannot make a sound," then it has to be "someone who cannot speak."

t_ch: 那个已然从深海中生还，却无法再走到台前开口说话的人——我很高兴得知她依旧在匹诺康尼，并且平安无事。
t_en: Someone who survived the treacherous depths, but is unable to take the stage and speak the truth. I'm happy to know she's safe and sound, and still on Penacony.

t_ch: 「提示」…不是「证据」么？
t_en: "Hint" ...is that not "proof"?

t_ch: 很遗憾，我没有证据。唯一能佐证这些猜想的，也只有家族面对「死亡」时的坦诚。他们对外来者太过慷慨，反而显得欲盖弥彰。
t_en: Proof is the one thing I don't have. The only thing that can prove these... conjectures... is for The Family to come clean. And with the way they buttered up these outsiders, it seems pretty clear they're intent on covering their tracks.

t_ch: 但怀疑一件事不需要证据，解开真相才要——对我而言，前者便已足够。我也无需找到那只忆域迷因，只要有人能像它一样「杀死」我即可。
t_en: But you don't need proof to have a suspicion, and for me suspicion is enough. I didn't need to find the memory zone meme. I just needed for someone to kill me like it killed the silver-haired girl.

t_ch: 在我看来，你其实没有十足的把握。特地进行全城广播，试图拉更多人入局…也是因为你在赌一个「有人能打破壁垒」的可能性。
t_en: You don't sound very confident to me. Going out of your way to make citywide broadcasts in an attempt to involve more people... You are simply betting on the possibility of someone being able to "break down the barrier."

t_ch: 你确实很幸运，命运使我们的道路交汇，而我恰好配有一柄利刃——锋利到足以斩落美梦的帷幕，同时将你身上「同谐」的烙印一刀两断……
t_en: You're very lucky that fate has decided to let us cross paths. I happen to be equipped with a very sharp blade — sharp enough to slice through the veil of dreams. I can also carve the Harmony's brand off of you...

t_ch: 你也很狡猾，故意设计让我们站在彼此的对立面，不断在他人面前重复「令使」的说辞，令我退无可退，唯有拔刀相向。
t_en: You possess great cunning. Deliberately setting us up to be on opposing sides, constantly repeating the words of the Emanator in front of others, leaving me no choice but to draw my blade against you.

t_ch: 所以你才能赢。时运和谋略，缺一不可。
t_en: And that's how you win. Opportunity and strategy, both are essential.

t_ch: 而在你的布局里，公司永远是赢家，即便最后你赌输了…对于家族而言，一位使节的性命也足够昂贵。
t_en: And in your plans, the IPC always wins. Even if you lose the bet... To The Family, the life of an ambassador is still invaluable.

t_ch: 一场豪赌，不是么？但容我指出一个错误：公司并非稳操胜券，在一件至关重要的事上，我的确没有后手。
t_en: It's a huge gamble, isn't it? But, allow me to point out a mistake: The IPC's success is not guaranteed — I unfortunately have no contingencies for such an important matter.

t_ch: 引爆一颗星核…我做不到。「砂金石」已经太过破碎，甚至无法保护我从舞台上全身而退。
t_en: Detonating a Stellaron... I can't do it. The aventurine stone is too broken to even safeguard my escape from the stage.

t_ch: 如果你到最后都没有拔出那把刀…就是我满盘皆输了。
t_en: If at the end of the day you did not unsheathe your blade... I would have lost the bet.

t_ch: 讨论「如果」没有意义。是你赢了，你为自己赢得了通往那片深海的入场券。
t_en: It is pointless to discuss "what-ifs." You have won. Your prize is an entry ticket into that deep sea.

t_ch: 而这之后，能否从深渊中归来…就是你的另一场豪赌了。
t_en: And after this, whether you can return from the abyss... is another gamble of yours.

t_ch: …你不曾犹豫过吗？
t_en: ...Have you never wavered?

t_ch: 犹豫…当然。但我只能相信我的好运。
t_en: Wavered? Of course I have. But I can only bank on my own good fortune.

t_ch: 因为除此之外，我一无所有。
t_en: Because other than that, I have nothing.

t_ch: …从这场<color=#ff3a3e>梦</color>中醒来，去你应去的地方吧。你的赌局…尚未结束。
t_en: ...Wake up from this <color=#ff3a3e>dream</color> and go to where you should be. Your gamble... is not over yet.

t_ch: …在分别前，能再回答我一个问题么？身为走在那条路上的人，你能否告诉我……
t_en: ...Before we part, can you answer one more question? As someone who has traveled on that road, can you tell me...

t_ch: 为什么我们要为了死亡而出生在这世上？
t_en: Why are we born into this world if it's just to die?

t_ch: 我从不这么认为。你也一样。
t_en: I don't think this, and never have. Nor do you.

t_ch: 可「虚无」的确笼罩着你我…还有每一个人。
t_en: But the Nihility envelops you and I... and everyone.

t_ch: 也正因如此，它没有意义。
t_en: And because of that, it's pointless.

t_ch: ——但它仍在那里。
t_en: But it is still there.

t_ch: 倘若命运的骰子从来都被灌铅，那就是我们命定的归宿，我们…又为何要与之相抗？
t_en: If the dice of fate are always weighted, then that is our destiny. Why then... do we struggle against it?

t_ch: …我的回答未必能消解你的困惑，因为它伴你一路走来，早已是你生命的一部分。
t_en: ...My answer might not be able to resolve your confusion, because it has been with you throughout your journey, and is already a part of your life.

t_ch: 但你说过，「睡眠是死亡的预演」，生命因何而沉睡？因为我们尚未准备好迎接死亡。
t_en: But you said, "Sleep is the rehearsal of death," so why does life slumber? Because we are not ready for the final rest.

t_ch: 所以你也一定能明白，我们为何*想要*做好准备。
t_en: So you can definitely understand, why we want to be prepared.

t_ch: 就算结局早已注定，那也无妨，人改变不了的事太多。
t_en: Even if the ending has been predetermined, that's fine. There are countless things that humans cannot change.

t_ch: 但在此之前，在走向结局的路上，人能做的事同样很多。
t_en: But before the end, there are many things that humans can do while on their journey.

t_ch: <color=#ff3a3e>而「结局」…也会因此展现截然不同的意义。</color>
t_en: <color=#ff3a3e>And because of this, the "end" will thus reveal a completely different meaning.</color>

t_ch: 看看你的口袋吧，你的朋友早就把答案交给你了。
t_en: Take a good look at your pocket. Your friend has already given you the answer.

t_ch: …祝你好运。
t_en: ...Good luck.

t_ch: …那我也该走了。
t_en: ...Then I shall get going.

t_ch: 先生……
t_en: Mister...

t_ch: 你要走了吗，你最后还是选择…离开这座梦境？
t_en: You're leaving? You ultimately chose to... leave this Dreamscape?

t_ch: …对。因为他们不在这里…爸爸、妈妈、姐姐……
t_en: ...Yes. Because they are not here... My papa, mama, and big sis...

t_ch: 那他们在哪儿？
t_en: Then where are they?

t_ch: 他们在每个人都会去往的地方，一个很远、很远的地方。
t_en: They are in a place where everyone will go. A very, very distant place.

t_ch: 你也要到那里去？
t_en: Then are you going too?

t_ch: 我总有一天也会走到那里。
t_en: I'll get there, one day.

t_ch: 但不是现在。
t_en: But not now.

t_ch: 会有那么一天，当天上再度洒落下雨，我会听见母神的呼唤，知道命定的时刻已至，我应去和我的家人重逢。
t_en: There will come a day when the sky will drizzle, and I will hear the call of Gaiathra Triclops and know that it is time for me to go and be reunited with my family.

t_ch: 所以在那一刻到来前…我应当做好「准备」。
t_en: So until the time comes... I should be preparing.

t_ch: 准备好什么？
t_en: Preparing for what?

t_ch: 准备好面对他们，卡卡瓦夏，成为{RUBY_B#母神赐福之子}他们的骄傲{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Preparing to face them, Kakavasha, and to make them proud.

t_ch: 我想，你会做到的。加油。
t_en: I know you'll be able to do it. Good luck!

t_ch: 当然。因为我是受母神赐福的孩子。
t_en: Of course. For I am a child who received the blessing of Gaiathra Triclops.

t_ch: 但你看起来还是很紧张……
t_en: But you still seem nervous...

t_ch: 我也这么觉得，也许只有你能帮我个忙了……
t_en: I seem that way because I am nervous. You know what? Maybe you can help...

t_ch: …最后一次，我们来「对掌」吧？
t_en: What do you say? One last time? Put our palms together?

t_ch: 「我心怀对明天的期许，沉入今晚的睡乡；直到一个又一个明天的尽头，我迎来安详的死亡。」
t_en: "With hope for the morrow nestled in my heart, I descend into the slumber of tonight. Until the denouement of all coming morrows kisses me, I have then embraced the quiet death."

t_ch: 可这个男人不一样，他活在当下。每个沉沦的夜晚，每次孤注一掷，他的梦中从未出现明日的模样。
t_en: But this man is different. He lives and breathes in the present. In every sinking night, by every daring gamble, no vision of morrow ever graced his dreams.

t_ch: 他的人生从来与安详无缘，而命运又要教他赢下所有，淌过一片又一片暴雨，直到泥浆覆过他的鼻腔。
t_en: His life knows not quietude. His fate yet demands him to win them all, to weather tempests, one after another... til mire enshrouds his very breath.

t_ch: 而现在，在深不见底的梦中，那颗下落的骰子…终于坠地了。
t_en: And now, in the unfathomable depths of dream, the once falling die... has at last landed on its earthly rest.

t_ch: 无声地…平静地…坠地了。
t_en: Quietly, peacefully, it at last landed.

t_ch: 「砂金石」的光芒…消失了。
t_en: The light of the aventurine stone... has disappeared.

t_ch: 这只代表一种结果……
t_en: This only represents one outcome...

t_ch: 他兑现了承诺。
t_en: He kept his promise...

t_ch: …也得偿所愿。
t_en: ...And got what he wanted.

t_ch: 按照计划，你的「基石」已被顺利送入家族的领地中。那么——
t_en: As planned, your cornerstone has been successfully sent to The Family's territory. Then—

t_ch: ——履行我们的职责，开始「收获」吧。
t_en: —Let's fulfill our duty and start "harvesting."

t_ch: 而后，在安眠者的摇篮中，在「盛会之星」的美梦深处——
t_en: Thereafter, in the cradle of slumberers, deep within the sweet dream of the Planet of Festivities —

t_ch: ——另一颗玉石开始绽放光芒。
t_en: Another stone begins to radiate light.

t_ch: 「我来觐见、我来添酒、我来占有。」
t_en: "Here I greet. Here I wine. Here I claim."

t_ch: 「我为甘露赐下鸩毒，春种秋收，静待枯果满枝头。」
t_en: "I grant poison for nectar. Sow in spring to reap in fall. Await wizened fruit to fill livened boughs."

t_ch: 「一切献给…琥珀王。」
t_en: "All for the... Amber Lord."

t_ch: 「…欢迎来到这个悲伤的世界，卡卡瓦夏。」
t_en: "...Welcome to this sad world, Kakavasha."

t_ch: 「你的好运是我们，也是所有埃维金人最宝贵的财富……」
t_en: "Your good luck is the most precious wealth we — all Avgin have."

t_ch: 「——两天时间，活着出来，证明你的本事货真价实。」
t_en: "If you come out alive after two days, it proves that you're the real deal."

t_ch: 「财富、地位、权力…公司会给你想要和不想要的一切。」
t_en: "Wealth, status, power... the IPC will give you whatever you want, even what you don't want."

t_ch: 「而我们，将在下一次『卡卡瓦』的极光下重逢。」
t_en: As for us, we will reunite in Kakava's next aurora.

t_ch: 很遗憾，这里不是你期待的地方。
t_en: It's a pity this is not the place you were expecting.

t_ch: …你醒了。
t_en: ...You're awake.

t_ch: 我在这里等你很久了。
t_en: I've been waiting on you for quite a while.

t_ch: 你是…？
t_en: And you are...?

t_ch: 你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
t_en: You've met me before — I'm Sam — the Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 什么情况，这里究竟是？
t_en: Just what's happening here?

t_ch: 梦与梦之间的狭缝。你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
t_en: A crevice between dreams. You've met me before — I'm Sam — a Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 是你…你做了什么？
t_en: It's you... what have you done?

t_ch: 我什么都没有做，只是等你醒来。你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
t_en: I didn't do anything but wait for you to wake up. You've met me before, I'm Sam — a Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 我本想更早出现在你面前，向你道出一些事实。
t_en: I originally planned on showing up earlier to reveal some truths to you.

t_ch: 但我受到的阻拦比预想更甚。<unbreak>11</unbreak>次，我做出尝试，却以失败告结，不知不觉中，我与这世界的联系变得太过紧密，难以逃离「剧本」的约束。
t_en: But I encountered more roadblocks than expected. Eleven times, I've tried, but ended in failure. Before I knew it, this world and I became too intertwined and it became too difficult to escape the constraints of the "script."

t_ch: …艾利欧说的没错，在这片梦想之地，你我都会得到难忘的收获。
t_en: ...Elio is right. In this Land of the Dreams, you and I will reap unforgettable gains.

t_ch: 我不如他和卡芙卡那样通晓人心，也没有银狼和刃的一技之长。我所擅长的种种，大多也只适用于无需怜悯的恶徒。
t_en: I don't know people's hearts as well as he and Kafka do, nor do I have a specialty like Silver Wolf and Blade. Most of the things that I'm good at only apply to villains who need no mercy.

t_ch: 所以——我所能使用的「手段」也只有一种。
t_en: So, there is only one method that I use.

t_ch: 同一时间 忆域深处
t_en: Meanwhile — Memory Zone Depths

t_ch: 你试图睁开眼，可看见的只有一片漆黑。
t_en: You try to open your eyes, but find only blackness before you.

t_ch: 这是哪儿？
t_en: Where is this?

t_ch: 发生了什么…
t_en: What happened?

t_ch: 这又是谁的视角？
t_en: And whose POV is this?

t_ch: 回忆逐渐浮现，时间倒流至几分钟前：砂金发动最后的攻势，闪闪发光的筹码雨倾盆而下，黄泉紧接着拔刀，然后，*砰*——
t_en: Memories gradually resurface as time rewinds to a few minutes ago: Aventurine unleashes the final assault, pouring down a dazzling shower of chips, followed closely by Acheron drawing her blade, and then, *crash*—

t_ch: ——那难以言明的力量将「存护」斩断，周遭的时空顷刻陷入停滞，你的思绪也在那一瞬间被拧成了一团。你的感官失灵了，只有重力撕扯你的大脑，在无边的黑暗中下坠……
t_en: The indescribable force severs the power of Preservation, while time and space froze instantly. Your thoughts twist into a knot as your senses fail, with only gravity tearing at your mind as you plummet into boundless darkness...

t_ch: …直到一簇火光将你拥入怀中。
t_en: ...until a fire engulfs you in its embrace.

t_ch: 对，我是{NICKNAME}。
t_en: Yes. I'm {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 好像有什么人救了我…
t_en: I think someone saved me...

t_ch: 无论如何，得离开这里。
t_en: Doesn't matter. I need to get out of here.

t_ch: 迷宫一样的走廊和厅房，无处不在的陷阱机关…这大宅子的主人疑心病有点重啊。
t_en: Labyrinth-like corridors and halls, traps everywhere... The owner of this mansion must be a bit paranoid.

t_ch: 你很幽默，治安官先生。希望这份幽默感已经帮助你找到了连环杀人案的凶手。
t_en: You're so funny, Mr. Security Officer. I hope that sense of humor of yours has helped you find the serial killer.

t_ch: 只是发表一下个人看法。怎么，戳到你痛处了？
t_en: Just expressing a personal opinion. Why, did I hit a nerve?

t_ch: 加拉赫先生，我的耐心不多。消极怠工——
t_en: Mr. Gallagher, my patience is wearing thin. Neglecting duties...

t_ch: ——只会让我更加怀疑你与真凶有所牵连。
t_en: ...will only make me more suspicious that you and the real serial killer are connected.

t_ch: 无赖、混混、酒鬼、流氓…这些垃圾话我可听过太多，但我真没想到，自己有朝一日还能被当作杀人魔的共犯。
t_en: Scoundrel, punk, drunk, hooligan... I've heard this trash talk all too often. But I have never once thought that I'd be treated as an accomplice to a murderer!

t_ch: 我收回前言：你的问题不是疑心太重。你是个疯子，懂吗？疯子。
t_en: I take back what I said: Your problem isn't paranoia. You're just crazy, you know? Lunatic.

t_ch: 你们——家族——把我这条老狗的脊梁骨打断，拔了獠牙，现在又开始指控我杀人？混账，只有苏乐达喝多了的白痴才会对街边的流浪狗发神经。
t_en: You — The Family — you broke my spine and pulled out my fangs, and now you want to accuse me of murder? Ridiculous, only idiots who've drunk too much SoulGlad will berate a stray dog on the streets.

t_ch: 究竟是什么东西让你在这不停地说疯话？比起我，你更应该去关心那群正在影视乐园闹得热火朝天的外宾。
t_en: What exactly is making you say all this nonsense? You should be more concerned about the outworld visitors who are making a scene in the theme park than me!

t_ch: 用不着你提醒。那位使节一出公馆的门，我就明白他想干什么，我的*仆人*全都看在眼里。他的小魔术确实骗过了我，但无妨，我非常乐意看见现在的局面。
t_en: I don't need you to remind me. The moment that ambassador walked out the doors of the mansion, I knew what he was trying to do. My servants see everything. His little magic tricks may have fooled me, but no matter, I'm happy to see how things have turned out.

t_ch: 你以为我为什么会放他走，又是为了什么才把那座影视乐园的舞台专门空出来？
t_en: Why do you think that I just let him go? And why do you think I emptied the theme park stage?

t_ch: 因为我的目标从始至终就是你，猎狗。他闹出的动静越大，我就越有机会让你和你{RUBY_B#「钟表匠」}真正的主人{RUBY_E#}血债血偿。
t_en: Because my target from the beginning has always been you, Hound. The more noise he makes, the more opportunities I have to make you and your {RUBY_B#The Watchmaker}true master{RUBY_E#} pay in blood!

t_ch: 如果我真是凶手，你又何必这么遮遮掩掩？哈，我忘了，你也有个{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼的「梦主」}不好伺候的主子{RUBY_E#}呢——他们叫你别管什么狗屁凶杀案，专心搞那「谐乐大典」……
t_en: If I were really the murderer, why would you need to be so secretive? Ha, I forgot, you also have {RUBY_B#Penacony's Dreammaster}a difficult master{RUBY_E#} to serve — telling you to ignore the murder case and focus solely on that Charmony Festival...

t_ch: …是不是啊，*温柔的兄长*？
t_en: ...Isn't that right, my brother?

t_ch: …看来你的伪装已经帮你充分了解到家族的每一处细节了。
t_en: ...Looks like your disguise has helped you successfully understand every facet of The Family.

t_ch: 伪装？你哪只眼睛看出来我是假人了？睁大眼睛仔细瞧瞧吧，带光环的——
t_en: Disguise? You must be blind to be accusing me of being a fake. Open your eyes and take a good look...

t_ch: 诚然，你身上的每一处都是真实的。棕色的头发，像{RUBY_B#梦境制作人}班尼{RUBY_E#}一样柔软、卷曲；橙色的眼珠，令我怀念{RUBY_B#隐夜鸫家主}惠特克爵士{RUBY_E#}的视线；古怪的伤疤，它是{RUBY_B#猎犬护卫长}伍尔西{RUBY_E#}的勋章……
t_en: Indeed, every part of you is real. The brown hair, soft and curly like {RUBY_B#Dreamscape Producer}Benny's{RUBY_E#}; the orange eyes, which make me miss the gaze of {RUBY_B#Head of the Nightingale Family}Sir Whittaker{RUBY_E#}; that odd scar, the mark of {RUBY_B#Head Bloodhound Guard}Woolsey{RUBY_E#}...

t_ch: 还有灰马甲、领带、猎犬勋章、水壶、调饮技术、治安官的身份…它们全都是真实的——
t_en: And the gray vest, tie, Hound Emblem, bottle, the bartending and your role as a security officer... These are all true traits...

t_ch: ——来自五十二位忠诚的*家族成员*。
t_en: ...from all fifty-two loyal Family members.

t_ch: 当它们汇聚于一处时，无数细小的真实便编织成谎言——你从每个人身上采撷一缕认知，将它们据为己有，在梦境中*虚构*出了一个完整的「加拉赫」……
t_en: When they are gathered, countless tiny truths are woven together into a lie — you collected a small piece of each of them and claimed them for yourself. Then you invented this facade, a complete Gallagher...

t_ch: …我说的对吗，「神秘」的爪牙？
t_en: ...Tell me I'm wrong, minion of the Enigmata.

t_ch: 哈哈……
t_en: Haha...

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈哈哈！你有种，厉害！可以啊，是我太低估你了……
t_en: Hahahaha! You have guts. I'll give you that! Not bad. I severely underestimated you...

t_ch: 我欣赏你。但所以呢？这就能证明是我杀了你的妹妹和那位偷渡犯吗？
t_en: Admirable. But so what? Can this prove that I murdered your sister and that stowaway?

t_ch: 这能证明你和忆域迷因「死亡」是一丘之貉——已经足够了。
t_en: This proves that you and the Memory Zone Meme "Death" are linked — and that's enough.

t_ch: 听好了，我根本不在乎你是如何做到的…我现在只在乎一件事，一个问题的答案——
t_en: Listen up. I don't care how you did it... I only care about one thing, the answer to a question...

t_ch: ——你这个混账，该死的丧家犬，为什么要杀了她？！
t_en: ...You devil! You wretched, despicable dog, why did you kill her!?

t_ch: 本台快讯：匹诺康尼「谐乐大典」已进入倒计时阶段。伴随着钟表小子的嘀嗒声，<unbreak>12</unbreak>个系统时后，这场庆典即将迎来盛大的开幕……
t_en: Newsflash: Penacony's Charmony Festival has entered its countdown phase. Accompanied by Clockie's tick-tocks, after <unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours, this grand celebration will commence with much fanfare...

t_ch: 都跟你说了！有什么事情可以好好商量！
t_en: I already told you! We can talk things out!

t_ch: 不好意思了，毛茸茸的小家伙，我实在有些要紧事要办，不得不用这种方式请你们帮个小忙。
t_en: I'm sorry, fluffy. I really have something urgent to attend to, so I had no choice but to resort to asking this favor of you all.

t_ch: 既然你知道自己在做什么，那我也必须提醒你这么做的风险。
t_en: Since you already know what you're doing, I'll also have to remind you of its risks.

t_ch: 兄弟，搞这么剑拔弩张做什么，掏这玩意儿不就是为了打个招呼？
t_en: Hey pardner, what's with the hostility? I thought pulling this thing out was just a way of saying hello?

t_ch: 最后一次，表明你的身份和来意。
t_en: For the last time, state your identity and purpose.

t_ch: 我叫波提欧，是个「巡海游侠」。
t_en: My name's Boothill, and I'm a Galaxy Ranger.

t_ch: 巡海游侠？
t_en: A Galaxy Ranger?

t_ch: 至于吗？表情跟活见了鬼似的，以为我们已经死绝了是吧？哈哈！确实，销声匿迹太久了就这坏处。
t_en: You look like you've seen a ghost. Did you think we all went extinct? Haha! Well, that's the price you pay for being off-grid for too long.

t_ch: 「巡猎」的义侠团体可不会劫持星穹列车。
t_en: The righteous heroes of The Hunt would never hijack the Astral Express.

t_ch: 我这不还没劫持呢么，拿着枪和人聊聊天就算「劫持」？
t_en: I ain't hijacked anything! What, chatting with someone while holding a gun is considered a hijacking?

t_ch: 大概算的帕……
t_en: It probably is...

t_ch: 恕我直言，银河中有许多关于巡海游侠现状的传闻，都不是什么美好的故事。我很难相信你。
t_en: Pardon my frankness, but there are plenty of rumors in the cosmos regarding the Galaxy Rangers' current status, and none of them are pretty stories. I have a hard time believing you.

t_ch: 笑死了，这帮傻宝编的故事越来越离谱，还说巡海游侠全都被原始博士变成长臂猿了，正在哪个山沟里荡秋千呢。
t_en: This is hilarious. The tale that this bunch of fools spin is getting out of hand — there's even a bit about the Galaxy Rangers being turned into gibbons by Dr. Primitive, and they're in some valley screwing around on swings.

t_ch: 当然，我知道你们不会信。所以同样地，我也不能轻信你们就是真的无名客。
t_en: Of course, I know you won't believe me. Which is also why, similarly, I have a hard time believing that you're the real Nameless.

t_ch: 瞧见这枪里的子弹了么？九毫米，永远的经典。眼下我需要星穹列车的帮助，但如果你们和那家伙一样是群冒牌货…啧，这子弹怕是要躺我脑门里了。
t_en: See the bullets in this gun? 9-millimeter, an eternal classic. I may need the Astral Express' help right now, but if you're an imposter just like that one... Tsk, then this bullet might just end up in my head.

t_ch: 我可不能让自己身陷危险，是这个道理吧。所以你们得先证明自己…哎，往哪走呢？
t_en: I can't allow myself to be exposed to danger. That's just the way it goes. So, you all have to first prove yourselves... Huh, where are you going?

t_ch: 认得这东西么？
t_en: Recognize this?

t_ch: 哈？这是——他宝贝的，结盟玉兆？！仙舟真把这东西给你们了？！
t_en: Hah? It's a... muddle-fudger... the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath!? The Xianzhou really gave this to you guys!?

t_ch: 宝、宝贝…？
t_en: *confused* M—Muddle-fudger?

t_ch: 这是仙舟「罗浮」景元将军赠予列车的玉兆。这物件在车上，便是仙舟联盟对星穹列车身份的认证。
t_en: This is the jade abacus gifted to the Express by the Xianzhou Luofu's General Jing Yuan. Its presence onboard serves as the Xianzhou Alliance's official recognition of the Express.

t_ch: 足够了么？
t_en: Is that enough?

t_ch: …行啊，小子。
t_en: ...Not bad, kiddo.

t_ch: …我不打算做什么。
t_en: ...I don't intend to do anything.

t_ch: 这由不得你。
t_en: That's not up to you.

t_ch: 知道么？第一次来到梦想之地的人，会下意识地停下脚步，确认自己仍站在坚实的土地上。然后，他们会不约而同地抬头望向天空。
t_en: Did you know? People who come to the land of dreams for the first time, they'll subconsciously stop to reaffirm that they're still walking on solid ground. And then, they will unanimously raise their heads to gaze at the sky.

t_ch: 无论现实或梦境，仰望天空是人类的本能。自「黄金的时刻」落成的那天起，它就一直在那里，守望每一个声色犬马的夜晚。
t_en: Be it reality or dream, staring at the sky is instinctual for humanity. Since the day that the Golden Hour was completed, it's always been there, watching over every single night of decadence.

t_ch: 可如今这片夜空却被无情斩断，染上「虚无」的阴霾。而这个过程…仅仅只在一刀之间。
t_en: But now this night sky has been mercilessly severed, dyed with the mist of Nihility. And this whole event... happened within the course of a single slash of a blade.

t_ch: 「一刀」…并不准确。其实是两刀，只是第二斩比较迅速。
t_en: A single slash of a blade... isn't really accurate. It was actually two blades, just that the second one was faster.

t_ch: 重点不在于此。
t_en: That's not the point.

t_ch: 这场盛会聚集了太多不应被邀请的客人。纵使「同谐」包容万象，为了匹诺康尼的和平，我也不得不对其中的一些人下达逐客令……
t_en: Many guests who weren't supposed to be invited have gathered at this banquet. Even if the Harmony is all-embracing, I have no choice but to show some of them the door... for the sake of Penacony, and the peace.

t_ch: 盛会之星容不下你，虚无的偃偶。活在阴影中的人，不应走上光亮的台前。
t_en: The Planet of Festivities has no place for you, a puppet of Nihility. Those who live in the shadows do not bear the right to tread the illuminated stage.

t_ch: 就生活在阴影中这点，我们应该没有区别。至少在和别人对话时，你应该现出本貌……
t_en: Speaking of living in the shadows, there's probably not much difference between us. It's only polite to reveal your true self, at least when speaking to others...

t_ch: 匹诺康尼的「梦主」。
t_en: Penacony's Dreammaster.

t_ch: 不能让你留下的理由，又多了一个。
t_en: That's just another reason that you can't stay.

t_ch: 但无论你是否相信，这就是真实的「我」。
t_en: Whether you believe it or not, this is the real "me."

t_ch: 不仅如此，每一位都是。
t_en: We are one.

t_ch: 这就是家族口中的「万众一心」？
t_en: Is this the "United as One" that The Family espouses?

t_ch: 我的凡胎早已消散，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六名孩子是我如今的眼、耳、口，在需要时代我将谐乐在这美梦中传扬，在必要时…替我将罪恶从这乐园里流放。
t_en: My mortal shell has long since dissipated. The Oak Family's one hundred and seven thousand, three hundred and thirty-six offspring are now my eyes, ears and mouths, spreading joy across dreams when required, and in times of essential need... exiling evil from this haven in my stead.

t_ch: 听起来，你要请我离开匹诺康尼了。
t_en: From the sound of it, it seems like you're asking me to leave Penacony.

t_ch: 很高兴你尚有自知之明，可惜，没有「请」。
t_en: I am glad that you're an understanding one. Alas, I'm not "asking."

t_ch: 你觉得自己能做到。
t_en: If you think you can.

t_ch: 你是在威胁我么？
t_en: Are you threatening me?

t_ch: 嗯…我用的是句号。这是一种…陈述。
t_en: Hmm... I ended it with a period. It was a statement, not a threat.

t_ch: 在知晓我身份后仍能流露出如此恶意的人，你不是第一个，也不会是最后一个。此情此景发生过太多次，面对我的问询，人们大多会反问「有何不可」。
t_en: Knowing who I am and still showing such malice, you're not the first, nor will you be the last. This scene played out many times before — and usually, when faced with my questions, most people retort "Why can't I?"

t_ch: 但结果…一直都是不可。
t_en: The result has invariably been that they "can't."

t_ch: 你很自信，但请记得——家族谦逊，可从不软弱。「同谐」的弦音遍及寰宇，若你不从，只要那把长刀出鞘分毫，你终其一生都无法逃离「无限夫长」的怒火。
t_en: You are confident, but be reminded: The Family is forgiving, but not weak. The chords of the Harmony extend across worlds — if you do not comply, when the blade is unsheathed for even a hair's breadth, you will never be able to escape the Eternal Centurion's wrath in all of your lifetime.

t_ch: 而在那之前…一百三十七人，这是自成为梦主以来，我亲手流放的外邦人。他们中曾有人折断我的双翼，曾有人将我的身躯焚毁……
t_en: One hundred and thirty-seven individuals: That is how many heathens I have exiled since I became Dreammaster. Among them, were those who once severed my wings, and those who immolated my body...

t_ch: 但今天，我仍站在这里，不介意为这数字再添一笔。
t_en: And here I stand again, about to add another mark to the tally.

t_ch: 然后你会死。我的意思是…「你们」都会。
t_en: And you will die. I mean... all of you will.

t_ch: …但那种事不会发生。就照你说的，我会离开。
t_en: ...But that won't come to pass. I'll do as you ask. I'll leave.

t_ch: 十分明智的选择。
t_en: A wise choice.

t_ch: 似乎也没有别的选项。
t_en: I wasn't aware there was a choice.

t_ch: 于你而言，这的确是唯一的道路。请时刻记得，你和匹诺康尼不属于一个世界，生于彼岸者，无法在此岸寻得归处。
t_en: To you, that surely is the only option. Please bear in mind, you and Penacony are of different worlds — those born on the far bank cannot seek solace across the river.

t_ch: 离开，永远别再回来。盛会之星的光芒太过耀眼，吸引了太多骗子、恶徒、罪犯，但即便是「同谐」…也绝对不会欢迎「虚无」的自灭者。
t_en: Leave, and never return. The radiance of the Planet of Festivities is overwhelmingly bright, luring in tricksters, wrongdoers, and criminals. But even the Harmony itself... will never welcome the Self-Annihilator of Nihility.

t_ch: 更何况这位自灭者还要带着周遭的一切入灭。你的力量分明是沉眠无相者的馈赠，深不见底，就像是深渊中淌出的一条支流，为众生带去死亡与罪恶。
t_en: And even more so, when this Self-Annihilator heralds the destruction of everything. Your strength is obviously a gift of the sleeping and shapeless, immeasurable and fathomless, like a tributary spawned from the abyss that brings death and sin to all.

t_ch: 「黄泉」…名副其实。
t_en: Acheron... a befitting name.

t_ch: 把这当作来自彼岸之人的忠告吧：你比我更清楚，匹诺康尼已然背离了「同谐」。无论你们的目的是什么…我只能看见一种结局。
t_en: Take it from someone on the other side of your so-called river: You know better than I do that Penacony has already deviated from the Harmony. Whatever your intentions may be... I foresee only one outcome.

t_ch: 它的未来是一片「虚无」，就和所有溺亡在{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}祂{RUBY_E#}阴影中的世界一样。
t_en: Its future holds nothing but Nihility, just like all the worlds that have drowned in {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}THEIR{RUBY_E#} shadow.

t_ch: 无论银河浩瀚，只需轻轻一握便能召唤成千上万的云骑军…宝了个贝的，得有多壮观啊。
t_en: And across these sprawlin' stars, a gentle squeeze is all it takes to rustle up a whole legion of Cloud Knights. Now I reckon that'd be one fudgin' sight to behold.

t_ch: 现在轮到你了。
t_en: Now, it's your turn.

t_ch: 巡海游侠离开聚光灯太久了，没这种道上公认的好东西。但这种场合我见得多了，解决方式也很简单……
t_en: Been ages since the Galaxy Rangers had the spotlight shone on 'em, and we ain't equipped with such fancy gadgets. But I've been around the block enough to know the way to handle these types of situations is easy as pie...

t_ch: 来吧，你可以随便向我发问，看看我的回答能不能赢得你的信任。要是真觉得可疑，再让我离开也不迟。
t_en: Alright then, feel free to toss any question my way, and let's see if my answers can't earn your trust. If your gut tells you otherwise, it still ain't too late to show me the door.

t_ch: 我凭什么配合你？
t_en: And why would I play along?

t_ch: 如果我真是巡海游侠，这么做你绝对不会吃亏。
t_en: If I truly am a real Galaxy Ranger, you stand to lose nothing.

t_ch: 说说看，巡海游侠是个怎样的组织？
t_en: Alright then. Tell me, what kind of organization are the Galaxy Rangers?

t_ch: 哈，兄弟，这问题够难回答的。我甚至很难说我们是个组织。
t_en: Ha, my friend, this question is a hard one. Don't think I can even consider us an "organization" to begin with.

t_ch: 无非是大家都走在「巡猎」的命途上，都有自己坚信的正义，都不是那么…受所谓「普世价值」的欢迎呗。
t_en: Everyone's on their own fated path along The Hunt, with their own resolute sense of righteousness, and not so... welcome among such so-called universal values.

t_ch: 这种回答得不到信任，只会让你的处境更加危险。
t_en: This reply does not instill trust, and only makes your predicament more precarious.

t_ch: 我猜你是想问什么共同的「信念」吧？但巡海游侠用不着那种东西，我们聚在一起，靠的是共同的「底线」。
t_en: I'm guessing you're gonna ask about some form of shared faith, right? But us Galaxy Rangers don't need that sort of thing. What brings us together is a shared bottom line.

t_ch: 不可欺凌弱小、不可滥杀无辜…这些个誓言可不是什么高高在上的信念，而是做人绝不应该触犯的底线。
t_en: Never bully the weak, never kill the innocent... These oaths aren't some lofty beliefs, but the fundamental bottom line that one must never cross as a person.

t_ch: 身为巡海游侠，我们只看底线，每当有人要践踏它时，「巡猎」的复仇就会找上门去。
t_en: As Galaxy Rangers, we strictly adhere to the bottom line — when someone crosses them, The Hunt's vengeance will surely come knockin'.

t_ch: 而这时，「底线」的另一重意义就来了——只要不触碰它，你做什么都行，明白么？
t_en: And in this moment, the other crucial meaning of "bottom line" comes into play — as long as you don't cross it, you're free to do whatever you please. You catch my drift?

t_ch: 第二个问题，为什么要找星穹列车的麻烦。
t_en: Second question: Why do you seek trouble with the Astral Express?

t_ch: 都说了，没想找你们麻烦。我有事必须去趟匹诺康尼，但没有邀请函，家族连酒店门都不让进。这不…只能借用下无名客的身份。全银河都知道你们是家族的贵客。
t_en: I already said that I seek no trouble. I must go to Penacony for a matter, but I don't have an invite, and I can't even enter The Family's hotel doors. If only... I could borrow the Nameless' identity. The entire cosmos knows you're guests of The Family.

t_ch: 巡海游侠不也是吗？
t_en: Aren't the Galaxy Rangers also esteemed guests?

t_ch: 哦！你说到点子上了…我就是为此而来的！告诉你们也无妨，游侠们在追杀一个「冒牌货」，一个穿我们衣服冒名顶替的小可爱，她现在就在匹诺康尼。
t_en: Oh! You've hit the nail on the head... This is why I'm here! It's fine if I tell you — the Rangers are pursuing an imposter, a son of a nice lady posing as one of us. She's on Penacony right now.

t_ch: 我的线人是个忆者。她就和所有的模因生物一样，突然出现，又突然消失。真他宝贝的吓人。但她提供了重要线索。
t_en: My informant is a Memokeeper. She's the same as all memetic organisms — appearing one moment, and gone the next. She scares the fudge outta me. Still, she gave me some vital info.

t_ch: 那个冒充巡海游侠的人…是谁？
t_en: That Galaxy Ranger imposter... Who is it?

t_ch: 这算是第三个问题了？
t_en: Is that the third question?

t_ch: 很难回答么？
t_en: Is it a hard question?

t_ch: 不难，只是说出来怕你不信。那家伙自称「黄泉」，根据我们的眼线，她很可能是一个…「虚无」的令使。
t_en: It isn't, just that you might not believe me. That person calls herself Acheron, and according to our informant, she could be... an Emanator of Nihility.

t_ch: 这不可能。
t_en: That's impossible.

t_ch: 看我怎么说的，放心，我刚得到这消息的时候，反应和你一模一样。
t_en: That's what I said. Don't worry. When I first received the news, I had the exact same reaction as you.

t_ch: IX从不瞥视任何人，这才符合常理。祂有什么理由授予凡人力量？
t_en: IX never gives anyone so much as a first glance, and that's perfectly normal. What reason would THEY have to bequeath strength unto mortals?

t_ch: 那你一定知道令使也可以隐瞒自己的身份，甚至对不少人而言，这么做更好，不然就意味着走上银河厮杀大舞台，甚至…背叛所行的命途。
t_en: Then you must know that Emanators can also conceal their own identities, which, for many people, is better that way. Otherwise, there'd be wanton bloodshed across the cosmos, or even... perhaps... turning their back on the Path they're supposed to follow.

t_ch: 我就有幸见识过一位「欢愉」令使，只看外表和那帮小丑根本没区别。要不是老子运气好把它灌醉了，还真不知道对面的身份这么「显赫」！
t_en: I had the good fortune of running into an Elation Emanator — its appearance was no different than that of those clowns. If it weren't through sheer luck that I got it drunk, I would have never known of its eminent status!

t_ch: 即便是最纯粹的「巡猎」也有灯光下的仙舟联盟和阴影中的巡海游侠。命途终究是由人创造的概念，一定存在超出你我认知的外界。
t_en: Even in the purest Hunt, you'll find the Xianzhou Alliance under the spotlight and Galaxy Rangers lurking in the shadows. Paths are inevitably concepts created by people, and exist in planes beyond our understanding.

t_ch: 认为「虚无」不存在令使…没准只是因为我们还不够「虚无」呢。
t_en: To reckon that Nihility Emanators don't exist...? Maybe we just ain't nihilistic enough.

t_ch: 所以明白了么，你的伙伴现在很危险，可以说是相当危险。如果还不相信，你大可给他们发个消息看看。但我会劝你动作快点……
t_en: So do you understand now? Your companions are in danger, and it's pretty harrowing. If you don't want to believe me, you'd best send a message to 'em. But I'd advise you to move fast...

t_ch: 毕竟咱俩谁都不知道梦境里发生了什么，也同样不知道那忆者的话有几分是真……
t_en: We don't know what's happening in the Dreamscape, or how much of what the Memokeeper said is true...

t_ch: 以及那位「黄泉」…究竟打算做什么。
t_en: And that Acheron... Who knows what she intends to do.

t_ch: …方才的奇异景象是由克劳克影视乐园的设备故障引发，家族已第一时间封锁现场，并无人员受伤。各位宾客敬请放心。
t_en: ...Attention, please: The unusual event that occurred moments ago was due to a technical malfunction at Clock Studios Theme Park. The Family has promptly responded to secure the area, and we're happy to report that there have been no injuries.

t_ch: 我敢发誓，那绝对不是拍电影！那么多筹码从空中掉下来，我还抓到了一枚，可转眼间它就消失得无影无踪了！
t_en: I swear that was no movie shoot! So many chips fell from the sky, and I even caught one of them, but it vanished in an instant before my very eyes!

t_ch: 请问，你说的是克劳克影视乐园的事故吗？
t_en: Excuse me, are you talking about the Clock Studios Theme Park incident?

t_ch: 嗯？对啊，怎么了…知、知更鸟小姐？！我没看错吧？
t_en: Hmm? Yeah, what about it... M—Miss Robin!? Am I seeing things right?

t_ch: 呵呵，别紧张。很抱歉给你的美梦之旅带来了不好的体验。你刚才提到的筹码令我很在意，能麻烦再详细说说吗？
t_en: Heh, no need to worry. I apologize for any inconvenience caused to your delightful dream journey. What you just mentioned about the chips really piqued my interest. Would you mind providing more details about the incident?

t_ch: 噢。就是…那种常见的筹码，花花绿绿的，哗哗掉下来，像下雨一样。
t_en: Oh. It was just... those chips you normally see everywhere — the green ones — they fell from the sky, as if it were raining!

t_ch: 然后那些筹码就直接消失了对吧？嗯，看来…是鸢尾花家系筹备已久的「拟梦技术」呢。
t_en: And then those chips simply disappeared? Ah, it appears... to be the DreamSim Tech the Iris Family has been developing.

t_ch: 诶？知更鸟小姐的意思是…那些筹码都是演出效果？可我明明——
t_en: Huh? Miss Robin, you mean... those chips were all part of a performance? But I really...

t_ch: 嘘——这项技术尚未公开，原本是要在谐乐大典上首次亮相的，没想到意外泄露了。
t_en: Shh — this technology hasn't been made public yet. It was originally planned to debut at the Charmony Festival, but it seems it's been leaked.

t_ch: 可否帮我保守这个秘密呢？因为这片如梦似幻的筹码雨…原定是要在我的演出上使用的。
t_en: Can you help me keep this secret? The raining chips... were supposed to be part of my act.

t_ch: 原、原来是这样啊！那就说得通了，只要能让谐乐大典顺利举办，我一定全力配合！
t_en: I—I see! Then it all makes sense now. I'll do anything to help make the Charmony Festival a success!

t_ch: 谢谢！作为交换，我也赠送你一份小礼品吧。
t_en: Thank you! As appreciation, I'd like to give you a token gift.

t_ch: 这个按钮是……
t_en: This button is...

t_ch: 在大典的某个时刻按下它，说不定会有惊喜哦。
t_en: Press it at just the right moment in the celebration, and there could be an unexpected treat in store for you.

t_ch: 好啦，似乎别的客人也在烦恼呢，我先失陪了，祝你继续享受这片梦境。
t_en: All right. It looks like there are other guests who are also confused. I'll have to excuse myself — please enjoy the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 家族承诺过，会保障客人在梦境中的安全。但我亲眼看见一群有机生命走向影视乐园，不久之后，天空就被划破，黑色的雨从虚空中渗出。
t_en: The Family promised they would protect the guests within the Dreamscape, but I witnessed a group of organic lifeforms making their way to the theme park, and soon after, a rip tore through the sky, and black rain started leaking out of the void.

t_ch: 家族需要给出一个合理的解释，否则我会立即带上爱人返回现实。如果梦境不再是乐园，继续留在这里也没有意义。
t_en: The Family needs to provide a reasonable explanation, or I'll take my loved ones and return to reality. I thought the Dreamscape was supposed to be a paradise. If it's not, then there's no point staying here.

t_ch: 看来这位先生是见识过许多场面的大人物，有不速之客混入了梦境，此事不假。
t_en: It appears the good sir has seen many great events, and it's true that an uninvited guest has unexpectedly entered the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 但他们的目标并非普通宾客，而是公司的使节。家族也一定会将客人们的安危列为优先级首位。
t_en: However, their target is not the ordinary guests, but the ambassadors of the IPC. The Family will certainly ensure that the safety of the guests is of the highest importance.

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐。我知道猎犬家系已经封锁了影视乐园，也相信家族能妥善控制局势，但这于事无补。
t_en: Miss Robin. I know the Bloodhound Family has already sealed off the theme park and has control over the situation, but it won't resolve the problem.

t_ch: 家族尽可以想方设法来维护声誉，而作为宾客，我同样不想以自己的生命作为赌注。
t_en: The Family can try their best to protect their reputation, but as a guest, I don't wish to gamble with my life.

t_ch: 可如您所见，先生，本次事故中没有任何无辜群众受到影响。
t_en: But as you can see, sir, no innocent bystanders were affected in this incident.

t_ch: 梦境或许不像承诺中那般完美，但没有什么地方比家族治理下的美梦更安全，相信您比我更清楚这点。试问如果这种事故发生在现实，又有多少人能全身而退呢？
t_en: Perhaps the Dreamscape is not as perfect as promised. But there's no place safer than dreams under The Family's rule. I believe you know this better than I do. If this incident happened in real life, how many people would be able to walk away from it?

t_ch: 我可以留在这里。但请记住，宾客来到匹诺康尼是为了享受梦境，不希望被牵扯进家族和公司的纠葛，别再让多余的事发生了。
t_en: I could stay here. But keep in mind, guests come to Penacony to enjoy the Dreamscapes. They do not wish to be entangled in a conflict between The Family and the IPC so, let's not have any more unnecessary incidents.

t_ch: 当然。谐乐大典开幕在即，我们也会尽全力做好准备，请放心。以示歉意，家族为宾客们准备了这份礼物。感谢各位的理解。
t_en: Of course. With the Charmony Festival about to commence, we will spare no effort in our preparations, rest assured. To express our apologies, The Family has arranged this gift for the guests. Thank you for understanding.

t_ch: 你好。请问这里发生什么事了吗？
t_en: Hello. May I ask what happened here?

t_ch: 啊，没什么大事，只是克劳克影视乐园出现了排演事故，请各位宾客稍安勿躁……
t_en: Nothing to be worried about. There's been a small rehearsal mishap at Clock Studios Theme Park. Please stay calm...

t_ch: 喂！你是傻的吗，知更鸟小姐都认不出来，以为在跟谁说话呢！
t_en: Hey! Are you a fool? You don't even recognize Miss Robin? Who do you think you're talking to?

t_ch: 啊？对对对对不起！我才转到猎犬家系没几天，还不习惯在街头工作，没注意到是您…非常抱歉！
t_en: Ah? I—I—I—I'm sorry! I've just been transferred to the Bloodhound Family, and I'm still not too used to working on the streets. I didn't realize it was you... I'm so sorry!

t_ch: 不用紧张，你们执勤辛苦了。现在情况还好吗？
t_en: Hey, don't sweat it. You guys have a tough job, I know how it is. How's the situation looking?

t_ch: 报告！我们封锁了影视乐园，大部分客人都对梦中的奇异景象习以为常，暂未发现隐患，预计很快就能恢复秩序。
t_en: We've sealed off the theme park. Most guests are used to bizarre phenomena in the Dreamscape, and so far, no threats have been detected. We can expect order to be restored soon.

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐放心，我们会加强巡逻，保证不出任何意外。
t_en: Rest assured, Miss Robin, we'll intensify our patrols to ensure that no incidents occur.

t_ch: 我相信你们。不过关于影视乐园发生的事，各位猎犬又是怎么想的呢？没关系，说出心底真实的想法就好。
t_en: I trust you guys. But... regarding what happened in the theme park, what do you Hounds think about it? It's okay. Feel free to speak your mind.

t_ch: 这个……
t_en: Well...

t_ch: 其实事发前不久我就在现场…公司的使节来者不善，这件事是真的吧？还有那位巡海游侠，轻而易举就斩断了天空……
t_en: Actually, I was there shortly after it happened... Is it true that the IPC's ambassadors came with ill intent? And that Galaxy Ranger who easily cut through the sky...

t_ch: 唉，知更鸟小姐，我实话跟您说，大家心里头都在犯嘀咕呢。本来这么多派系齐聚匹诺康尼就够让人不安的了……
t_en: Miss Robin, to tell you the truth, everyone has been talking about it. The myriad factions on Penacony have already been causing unease for everyone...

t_ch: 感谢你们对家族的忠诚，盛会之星确实遇到了些麻烦，那位公司的代表…试图收回匹诺康尼的所有权，甚至做好了采取强硬手段的准备。
t_en: Thank you all for your loyalty towards The Family. The Planet of Festivities has indeed run into some trouble. The representative from the IPC... He's trying to regain ownership of Penacony, and is prepared for a hostile takeover.

t_ch: 当然，家族没有同意。交涉破裂的结果…就如你们所见。
t_en: Of course, The Family did not agree. The result of the failed negotiations... is as you see it now.

t_ch: 怪不得。我听说公司员工被禁止进入梦境，原来这才是主因。那个闹事的混蛋呢，有被抓住吗？
t_en: No wonder. So this is the main reason why the IPC staff are banned from entering the Dreamscape. Did they apprehend the troublemaker in the end?

t_ch: 放心，星期日先生正在追踪他的去向，预计很快会有结果。但事已至此，公司一定不会轻易罢休，所以梦境的秩序和稳定就要拜托你们了。
t_en: Don't worry. Mr. Sunday is currently tracking his whereabouts and he'll have something to show for it soon. However, given the situation, the IPC surely won't let this go easily. Therefore, we are relying on you Hounds to maintain the order and stability of the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 知更鸟小姐放心。我们肯定会认真执行命令，绝不让公司的家伙得逞！
t_en: Please be assured, Miss Robin, we take our orders seriously. We won't let those IPC cronies get away with this!

t_ch: 辛苦了。如果还有其他成员感到不安，可以代我转述。守护梦境需要大家共同的努力。
t_en: Thank you for your hard work. If there are any other members who still feel uneasy, please tell them on my behalf that protecting the Dreamscape requires everyone's help.

t_ch: 这是鸢尾花家系为客人们准备的小礼物，也给你们一份。在谐乐大典上打开，会有意想不到的惊喜哦。
t_en: This is a small gift prepared by the Iris Family for the guests — there's one for you too. Please open it at the Charmony Festival for an unexpected surprise!

t_ch: 居然收到了知更鸟小姐的礼物…简直像是做梦一样！不对，我这不是已经在梦里了吗？
t_en: I can't believe I received a gift from Miss Robin... It feels like I'm dreaming! Wait — I AM in a dream!

t_ch: 要真有人来找事，我们不怕上战场。请放心，梦境的和平稳定就由猎犬们来守护！
t_en: If trouble comes knocking on our door, we're not afraid to go to war. Rest assured. The Dreamscape's peace will be protected by the Bloodhound Family!

t_ch: 知更鸟…小姐？是那位闻名宇宙的超级明星——知更鸟小姐！
t_en: Miss Robin...? That's the renowned cosmic superstar — Miss Robin!

t_ch: 没想到会在这遇见粉丝呢，我很荣幸。欢迎来到匹诺康尼，一个满盈着美梦的世界。
t_en: I didn't expect to meet a fan here. I'm honored. Welcome to Penacony, a world filled with wonderful dreams.

t_ch: 没想到能遇见真人…您、您这时候不是应该在为谐乐大典的召开做准备吗？
t_en: I can't believe I'm actually meeting the real Robin... Sh—Shouldn't you be preparing for the Charmony Festival?

t_ch: 舞台筹备固然重要，但举办仪典本就是为了向各位传达神主的谐乐，如有机会能与大家共唱，我自然不应拒绝。
t_en: Preparation is important, but the ceremony is fundamentally about sharing the Great One's harmony with everyone. If there's a chance to sing with everyone, I will not refuse.

t_ch: 方才那场事故，给部分宾客带来了不好的体验。作为家族的一员，我理应前来向各位致歉。
t_en: Regarding the recent mishap... I understand it negatively impacted some of our guests. As a member of The Family, it's only right for me to come forward and offer my apologies to everyone.

t_ch: 可…那真的是事故吗？我们都看见了如雨滴般坠落的筹码，还有划破天空的红光。说是特效未免也太逼真了吧？
t_en: But... are you sure it was actually a mishap? Everyone saw those chips descending like rain and the red light tearing through the sky. Claiming it was merely special effects seems a bit farfetched.

t_ch: 我还遇到了那位慷慨的先生，他的样子很不对劲，始终在自言自语，难道这也是剧本的布景？
t_en: Plus, I met that generous gentleman. He looked really out of it and kept talking to himself. Is this also part of the performance?

t_ch: 请大家不要惊慌。相信家族能给各位一个满意的答复。
t_en: Everyone, please do not panic. I believe that The Family will give everyone a satisfactory answer in due time.

t_ch: 可就算知更鸟小姐这么说…也很难相信啊……
t_en: Even if you say so, Miss Robin... It's hard to believe...

t_ch: 唉，也有这种怎么都不听劝的人啊。没完没了…我也是会累的。
t_en: Ugh, some people just never listen, do they? It's never-ending. It just goes on and on... I'm getting really tired of this.

t_ch: 知更鸟…小姐？
t_en: Miss Robin...?

t_ch: 但还是帮人帮到底吧，没办法，谁叫我是出了名的乐•善•好•施呢？
t_en: Still, I suppose I should keep on helping everyone, I am the epitome of "joy, kindness, and goodness," after all.

t_ch: 咦，我刚刚是在做什么来着？小姐你又是……
t_en: Huh, what was I just doing? And who might you be, miss...?

t_ch: 收下这份礼物吧，小宾客。这可是家族特意为你准备的礼物。
t_en: Here, take this, little guest. This gift has been specially prepared for you by The Family.

t_ch: 一定要好好拿着它，等到谐乐大典开幕，然后——在剧目的最高潮，和身边的人一同摁下这个按钮……
t_en: Make sure to take good care of it until the opening of the Charmony Festival. Then, when the show reaches its climax — press the button together with the others around you...

t_ch: 说不定…会发生非常有趣的事哦？
t_en: You never know... something VERY exciting might happen!

t_ch: 放心吧，我不会告诉别人的。期待知更鸟小姐的演出！
t_en: Don't worry. I won't tell anyone. I can't wait for your performance, Miss Robin!

t_ch: 我可以留在这里。但请记住，宾客来到匹诺康尼是为了享受梦境，不希望被牵扯进家族和公司的纠葛，别再让多余的事发生了。
t_en: I could stay here. But keep in mind, guests come to Penacony to enjoy the Dreamscapes. They do not wish to be entangled in a conflict between The Family and the IPC so, let's not have any more unnecessary incidents.

t_ch: 居然收到了知更鸟小姐的礼物…简直像是做梦一样！不对，我这不是已经在梦里了吗？
t_en: I can't believe I received a gift from Miss Robin... It feels like I'm dreaming! Wait — I AM in a dream!

t_ch: 要真有人来找事，我们不怕上战场。请放心，梦境的和平稳定就由猎犬们来守护！
t_en: If trouble comes knocking on our door, we're not afraid to go to war. Rest assured. The Dreamscape's peace will be protected by the Bloodhound Family!

t_ch: 这么多人都在议论，影视乐园闹出的动静可真大呀……
t_en: So many people talking about it, this commotion at the theme park definitely made waves...

t_ch: 我从来不知道，你还会做这种事。
t_en: I never knew you could do this.

t_ch: …你有驾驶证吗？
t_en: ...Do you have a driver's license?

t_ch: 有。
t_en: I do.

t_ch: 这可真是…令人意外。
t_en: That is... surprising.

t_ch: 为什么，因为这里是罪恶都市耶佩拉？
t_en: Why? Because this is Jepella, the city of sins?

t_ch: 嗯，不…没什么。
t_en: Mhmm, no... it's nothing.

t_ch: 我只是觉得，你已经二十个系统时没睡了…没问题吗？
t_en: I'm just thinking, you haven't slept in twenty system hours... Are you sure you're okay?

t_ch: 没问题。死不了，我和你都一样。
t_en: I'm fine. I'll survive. Same goes for you.

t_ch: 我可未必，还是开慢点吧。
t_en: I'm not so sure about that. Slow down a bit.

t_ch: 潜入已经结束了，你随时可以启动「萨姆」。
t_en: Infiltration is over. Feel free to activate Sam anytime you like.

t_ch: 离「剧本」下一幕还有些时间，让我再多待会儿吧，用这副身体。
t_en: There's still some time before the next part of the script unfolds. Let me stay a little longer in this body.

t_ch: 而后便是良久的沉默。两人不再提起任何话题，似乎对这种沉默习以为常。
t_en: A long silence ensued. Neither of them brought up any topic, seemingly accustomed to this silence.

t_ch: 直到很久以后，车里再度响起一声轻叹。
t_en: It wasn't until much later that a soft sigh once again broke the quiet in the car.

t_ch: 好长的隧道啊。出发的时候，没觉得它有这么长。
t_en: Such a long tunnel. Didn't feel this long when I set off.

t_ch: 半个系统时后，它会带我们找到卡芙卡，接着就是耶佩拉兄弟会的覆灭。
t_en: In half a system hour, it will lead us to Kafka, and then comes the downfall of the Jepella Brotherhood.

t_ch: 这些也都是「剧本」？
t_en: Is that also part of the script?

t_ch: 你的「剧本」里也有。
t_en: It's in your script, too.

t_ch: 抱歉，我没注意。
t_en: Sorry, I didn't notice.

t_ch: 就算你选择性忽视，他们的命运也不会改变。
t_en: Their destiny won't change just because of your selective ignorance.

t_ch: 我说过，这是个坏习惯。
t_en: I told you before, it's a bad habit.

t_ch: 那你呢？这一次，你能得到想要的「死亡」么？
t_en: What about you, then? Is this the moment you finally find the "Death" you've been looking for?

t_ch: 一如既往，一片空白。它不在这颗星球。为什么突然问这个？
t_en: As always, it's a blank slate. It's not on this planet. Why the sudden inquiry?

t_ch: 因为我正在一辆疲劳驾驶的车上…我希望它能安全抵达。
t_en: Because I'm currently in a car with a sleep-deprived driver... I just want to get there in one piece.

t_ch: 这车有自动驾驶，我只是把手搭在方向盘上，行了吧？
t_en: This car has full self-driving capabilities. I'll just put my hand on the steering wheel. Will that do?

t_ch: 开玩笑的啦。
t_en: Hey, don't take everything so seriously.

t_ch: …艾利欧总说命运只有一种，谁也无法绕开。他能看见未来，而我们…同样知晓自己「既定的结局」。
t_en: ...Elio would always say there's only one type of destiny: The inescapable type. He can see the future, and we... likewise are aware of our "predetermined end."

t_ch: 但在那一刻到来前，人依旧能为自己选择去做些什么…我们都有这个权利，对吧？
t_en: But before that moment arrives, we can still choose what we do... We all have this right, don't we?

t_ch: 今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
t_en: After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...

t_ch: 那就是你的下一站。
t_en: That's your next stop.

t_ch: 梦想之地，匹诺康尼。
t_en: Land of the Dreams, Penacony.

t_ch: 祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
t_en: I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.

t_ch: 一切回到了原点，你曾经从这里踏入「黄金的时刻」，也将从这里踏入真正的{RUBY_B#流放之地}「匹诺康尼」{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: We're back to where it all began. You entered the Golden Hour from this place, and it is also from here where you will enter the true {RUBY_B#Land of the Exiles}Penacony{RUBY_E#}.

t_ch: 很高兴能再次与你同行。事到如今，我也终于能向你袒露全部的事实。如你所见…我的另一个名字是「星核猎手」萨姆。
t_en: It's a pleasure to journey alongside you once more, but it's time I laid bare the entire truth before you. As you might have heard... I also go by another name: Stellaron Hunter, Sam.

t_ch: 你…没事吗？
t_en: Are you... all right?

t_ch: 我没事…抱歉，希望先前没有吓到你。
t_en: I'm fine... Sorry, I hope I haven't scared you.

t_ch: 你欺骗了我…
t_en: You lied to me...

t_ch: 抱歉，我不得不这么做……
t_en: I'm sorry. I had no other choice...

t_ch: 你是…流萤的灵魂？
t_en: Are you... Firefly's soul?

t_ch: 我知道你有很多疑问…还记得我们在陌生的梦境里遭遇了「死亡」吗？那时我被迷因攥在手中……
t_en: I know you have many questions... Do you remember when we encountered "Death" in that strange Dreamscape? When I was caught by that meme...

t_ch: 在它即将行凶的瞬间，我从那只骇人的瞳孔里看见了「另一片梦境」的倒影。
t_en: In that instant before it killed me, I saw the reflection of another Dreamscape in its ghastly pupils.

t_ch: 根据「剧本」的提示，我对那只迷因有了些猜想。于是我让银狼寄出邀请，将各位引导至梦中的酒店……
t_en: So, following the clues in the script, I came up with some theories about the meme. That's why I instructed Silver Wolf to issue invitations, drawing everyone to the dream's hotel...

t_ch: 我本打算在你们面前唤来「死亡」，用更直接的手段揭示谜底，邀请你们入局。但事与愿违，我无法违背「剧本」，甚至来不及开口向你说明。
t_en: I intended to call upon "Death" before you arrived, to solve the riddle using more direct means, and then invite you to join. However, contrary to my wishes, I couldn't defy the script, and I didn't get a chance to explain it to you.

t_ch: 就像你看到的，我被「死亡」的翼刃贯穿。浓稠忆质的重压…它们在脑海中炸开，恍若现实。
t_en: It is how you see now — I was impaled by the bladed wings of "Death." The heavy pressure of concentrated memoria miasma... exploded in my mind, as if it was actually reality.

t_ch: 但一瞬的麻痹散去后，我发现自己的身体完好无损。
t_en: But after the momentary numbness subsided, I found that my body was absolutely unscathed.

t_ch: 我果然还活着，且如我所想——抵达了与「美梦」截然不同的地方。匹诺康尼的梦境下埋藏着另一片更原始，也更混沌的忆域，它的名字是…「流放之地」。
t_en: I was still alive, and it was just as I thought — I had arrived at a place starkly different from this beautiful dream. Beneath the Dreamscape of Penacony lies another more chaotic, more primal Memory Zone. Its name... Land of the Exiles.

t_ch: 于是我返回梦境中的酒店，想告诉你它的存在。但我还不能公开自己的身份，只能想办法转移与你同行之人的注意，将你带离战场。
t_en: And so then I returned to the hotel in the Dreamscape, hoping to tell you of its existence. Yet I could not reveal my own identity, so I could only divert your party's attention and lure you away from the battlefield.

t_ch: 而后，我的种种尝试皆以失败告终。直到不久前，一道血红的刀光劈碎了梦中的高墙，令你们跌落到这深层的梦境中，我才得以将你和同伴们一个个唤醒……
t_en: And after, all my attempts proved futile. It wasn't until not long ago, when a crimson blade of light shattered the high wall of the dream, causing you all to fall far into the abyssal depths of the Dreamscape, that I was able to awaken you and your companions one by one...

t_ch: 这就是此前发生的一切。
t_en: And that's it, that is all that's happened so far.

t_ch: 我完全理解了！
t_en: I completely understand!

t_ch: 我完全糊涂了！
t_en: I'm completely confused!

t_ch: 我知道，要无条件地相信这些很难。我只是想说，你离最后的答案很近了。只需做一件事，我就能为你证明……
t_en: I know it's tough to believe all this without reservations. I just want to say you're very close to the final answer — just one more thing needs to be done, and then I can prove it to you...

t_ch: 接下来，让我们离开这里吧…请闭上眼。
t_en: Now, let's leave this place... Please close your eyes.

t_ch: 然后深呼吸，在心里描绘梦境的轮廓，记得…绝对不要睁眼。
t_en: Take a deep breath, and visualize the Dreamscape's outline in your heart. And remember... you must not open your eyes at all times.
Three...
Two...
